en.extract:
The pale rosefinch (Carpodacus stoliczkae) is a species of finch in the family Fringillidae. It is found in Afghanistan and China. It was formerly considered conspecific with the Sinai rosefinch. Its natural habitat is hot deserts.

The '''pale rosefinch''' ('''''Carpodacus stoliczkae''''') is a species of [[finch]] in the family [[Fringillidae]]. It is found in [[Afghanistan]] and [[China]]. It was formerly considered conspecific with the [[Sinai rosefinch]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is hot [[desert]]s.

zh.extract:
沙色朱雀（台湾作淡色朱雀）（学名：Carpodacus stoliczkae），是雀形目燕雀科的一种鸟类。


特征
沙色朱雀体重约20.8克，翼长约83.9毫米，嘴峰长约11.7毫米，喙宽度约6.3毫米，喙厚度约7.9毫米，跗蹠长约18.5毫米，尾长约66毫米。沙色朱雀在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在开放的沙漠中，食性为草食性。


亚种
C. s. salimalii：分布于阿富汗东北部。
C. s. stoliczkae：分布于中国新疆西南部。该亚种的模式产地在新疆莎车。
C. s. beicki：分布于中国西部（青海省东北部的西宁河地区至甘肃省西北部地区）。该亚种的模式产地在南大通山。
